---
title: "Breast Cancer PCA and QDA Analysis"
author: "Hansamali Lekamalage"
date: "2025-12-05"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(MASS)       
library(factoextra) 
library(caret)      
library(biotools)
library(corrplot)
```


```{r}
# Load the Wisconsin Breast Cancer Dataset
data_raw <- read.csv("breastCancer.csv", header = T)

# Separate the Target (Y) and Predictors (X)
Y <- data_raw$diagnosis 
X <- data_raw[,-c(1,2)]
X <- as.data.frame(lapply(X, as.numeric))
```


```{r}
#Correlation matrix
corr <- cor(X, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

corrplot(corr, 
         method = "color",           
         type = "full",             
         tl.col = "black",            
         tl.cex = 0.6,                
         tl.srt = 45,                 
         col = colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "#4393C3", "#92C5DE", 
                                  "#D1E5F0", "#FFFFFF", "#FDDBC7",
                                  "#F4A582", "#D6604D", "#B2182B"))(200),
         addCoef.col = "black",       
         number.cex = 0.45,           
         number.digits = 2,           # Two decimal places
         title = "",
         mar = c(0,0,2,0),            # Margins
         cl.cex = 0.8)
```


```{r}
# Split Data for Training and Testing (70/30)
set.seed(42)
train_index <- createDataPartition(Y, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)

X_train <- X[train_index, ]
Y_train <- Y[train_index]

X_test <- X[-train_index, ]
Y_test <- Y[-train_index]
```

### Principal Component Analysis (PCA)
```{r}
# Run PCA on the standardized TRAINING data
pca_model <- prcomp(X_train, scale. = T)

# Determine the number of components (k) to retain (e.g., aiming for > 90% variance)
pca_summary <- summary(pca_model)
pca_summary
```


```{r}
eigenvalues <- round(pca_model$sdev^2,3)

# Extract proportion and cumulative proportion
prop_var <- round(pca_summary$importance[2, ],3)
cum_prop_var <- round(pca_summary$importance[3, ],3)

# Create a data frame with all columns
pca_table <- data.frame(
  PC = paste0("PC", 1:length(eigenvalues)),
  Eigenvalue = eigenvalues,
  Proportion = prop_var,
  Cumulative = cum_prop_var
)
pca_table
```


```{r}
fviz_eig(pca_model)
```


```{r}
k<-4
pca_model$rotation[,1:k]
```


```{r}
# Extract PC Scores for Training and Testing Data
train_pc_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_model$x[, 1:k])
train_pc_scores$diagnosis <- Y_train

test_pc_scores <- as.data.frame(predict(pca_model, newdata = X_test)[, 1:k])
test_pc_scores$diagnosis <- Y_test
```

### Assumptions 
```{r}
# 1. Homogeneity of Covariance Matrices (Check for LDA)
box_m_result <- boxM(train_pc_scores[, !(names(train_pc_scores) %in% "diagnosis")], 
                     group = Y_train)

print(box_m_result)
```

```{r}
# 2. Multivariate Normality

par(mfrow = c(2, 2)) # Set up a 1-row, 2-column plot layout

# Q-Q Plot for PC1 - Malignant Group (M)
qqnorm(train_pc_scores$PC1[Y_train == 'M'], 
       main = "PC1 - Malignant (M) Group")
qqline(train_pc_scores$PC1[Y_train == 'M'], col = "red", lwd = 2)


qqnorm(train_pc_scores$PC1[Y_train == 'B'], 
       main = "PC1 - Benign (B) Group")
qqline(train_pc_scores$PC1[Y_train == 'B'], col = "red", lwd = 2)


qqnorm(train_pc_scores$PC2[Y_train == 'M'], 
       main = "PC2 - Malignant (M) Group")
qqline(train_pc_scores$PC2[Y_train == 'M'], col = "red", lwd = 2)


qqnorm(train_pc_scores$PC2[Y_train == 'B'], 
       main = "PC2 - Benign (B) Group")
qqline(train_pc_scores$PC2[Y_train == 'B'], col = "red", lwd = 2)


qqnorm(train_pc_scores$PC3[Y_train == 'M'], 
       main = "PC3 - Malignant (M) Group")
qqline(train_pc_scores$PC3[Y_train == 'M'], col = "red", lwd = 2)


qqnorm(train_pc_scores$PC3[Y_train == 'B'], 
       main = "PC3 - Benign (B) Group")
qqline(train_pc_scores$PC3[Y_train == 'B'], col = "red", lwd = 2)

qqnorm(train_pc_scores$PC4[Y_train == 'M'], 
       main = "PC4 - Malignant (M) Group")
qqline(train_pc_scores$PC4[Y_train == 'M'], col = "red", lwd = 2)

qqnorm(train_pc_scores$PC4[Y_train == 'B'], 
       main = "PC4 - Benign (B) Group")
qqline(train_pc_scores$PC4[Y_train == 'B'], col = "red", lwd = 2)


```

### Discriminant Analysis (DA) with PC Input 

```{r}

# 3a. Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA)

lda_pca_model <- lda(diagnosis~., data = train_pc_scores)
lda_pca_model

# Evaluation
lda_pca_pred <- lda_pca_model %>% predict(test_pc_scores)
lda_accuracy <- mean(lda_pca_pred$class == test_pc_scores$diagnosis)
print(paste("LDA Classification Accuracy:", round(lda_accuracy * 100, 2), "%"))

# Confusion Matrix
lda_conf_matrix <- table(Actual = test_pc_scores$diagnosis, Predicted = lda_pca_pred$class)
print(lda_conf_matrix)
```


```{r}
# 3b. Quadratic Discriminant Analysis (QDA)
qda_pca_model <- qda(diagnosis~., data = train_pc_scores)

# Evaluation
qda_pca_pred <- qda_pca_model %>% predict(test_pc_scores)
qda_accuracy <- mean(qda_pca_pred$class == test_pc_scores$diagnosis)
print(paste("QDA Classification Accuracy:", round(qda_accuracy * 100, 2), "%"))

# Confusion Matrix
qda_conf_matrix <- table(Actual = test_pc_scores$diagnosis, Predicted = qda_pca_pred$class)
print(qda_conf_matrix)
```


```{r}
# 1. Extract values from the Confusion Matrix
# Structure: Rows = Actual, Cols = Predicted
TP <- qda_conf_matrix["M", "M"]  # True Positive (Actual M, Pred M)
TN <- qda_conf_matrix["B", "B"]  # True Negative (Actual B, Pred B)
FP <- qda_conf_matrix["B", "M"]  # False Positive (Actual B, Pred M)
FN <- qda_conf_matrix["M", "B"]  # False Negative (Actual M, Pred B)

# 2. Calculate Metrics
sensitivity <- TP / (TP + FN)
specificity <- TN / (TN + FP)

# 3. Print Results
print(paste("Sensitivity (Recall):", round(sensitivity * 100, 2), "%"))
print(paste("Specificity:", round(specificity * 100, 2), "%"))


```
